title: PCI DSS v4.0 1.4.5 — dACL Push Integrity for CDE Switch Ports
evidence: Saved search archived to `audit_evidence` with PCI 1.4.5 tagging.

compliance.assurance_rationale: PCI DSS v4.0 1.4.5 — segmentation enforcement integrity. UC-17.1.75 evidences that downloadable ACLs intended for CDE-port enforcement actually push to the switch and are not silently truncated.
compliance.controlObjective: Demonstrate that dACLs intended to enforce CDE-port restrictions reach the network access device intact and are not truncated by switch TCAM limits.
compliance.evidenceArtifact: Saved search 'UC-22.11.110' archiving dACL push-failure events to `audit_evidence` with `pcidss_clause=1.4.5`.

controlTest.positiveScenario: Push oversized dACL to limited-TCAM switch. Truncation event captured.
controlTest.negativeScenario: All dACL pushes succeed. Empty result.

app: Splunk Enterprise Security (263) + Splunk Add-on for Cisco Identity Services (1915).
spl:
index=nac sourcetype="cisco:ise:syslog" MessageCode IN (5437, 5438) earliest=-1d
| stats count by dacl_name, nas_ip, MessageCode
| eval pcidss_clause="1.4.5", control="dACL_Integrity"
| collect index=audit_evidence
description: We continuously evidence PCI DSS v4.0 1.4.5 — dACL push integrity to CDE switch ports.
value: Truncated or failed dACLs silently weaken CDE access control. Daily archived evidence ensures the QSA can confirm that segmentation enforcement, not just policy, was working.
implementation: Schedule the saved search daily at 06:00 local time; archive results to the `audit_evidence` summary index for ISO 27001:2022 evidence.
visualization: PCI 1.4.5 dACL panel: failure trend; truncation count.

references.title: UC-17.1.75 — dACL Push Failures and ACL-Length Truncation

knownFalsePositives: 1. Switches under reload — push failures may be transient.
detailedImplementation:
## Prerequisites

- UC-17.1.75 operational.

## Step 1-5

```ini
[UC-22.11.110: PCI 1.4.5 — dACL Push Integrity Evidence]
cron_schedule = 0 6 * * *
actions = summary_index
action.summary_index._name = audit_evidence
action.summary_index.marker = uc=22.11.110,reg=PCIDSS,clause=1.4.5
```

Quarterly evidence pack for QSA review.
grandmaExplanation: We continuously evidence PCI DSS v4.0 1.4.5 — that dACLs intended for CDE switch ports actually arrived intact. That is important for the audit, where proof needs to line up with what the rules expect.
